creator: knu@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed with the following minor fixes, thanks! 

- Do not touch the makefiles' header part. 
- Fix the plist's so they can successfully package and deinstall. 
- Do not let mingw-gcc install ${PREFIX}/lib/libiberty.a because it 
overwrites the one mingw-binutils installs. 
- Change the mingw meta port's BUILD_DEPENDS to RUN_DEPENDS. 
- Replace WRKSRC=${WRKDIR} with NO_WRKSUBDIR=yes.
